description.content: Product catalog management including variants and images

Returns a paginated list of products in the merchant's catalog. By default returns up to 50 products per page. Use the cursor parameter from the previous response's pagination.nextPageCursor to retrieve subsequent pages. Each product includes its basic metadata, variant information, and associated images.

query.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's pagination.nextPageCursor field. Omit or leave empty to retrieve the first page.

response.name: Successful response with paginated list of products

Creates a new product in the merchant's catalog with appropriate subresources based on product type. Supports creation of physical, service, gift card, and digital download products. The request must include the product type, name, and at least one variant. Images can be added after the product is created using the product image endpoints.

Retrieves detailed information for up to 50 specific products by their product IDs. Product IDs should be provided as a comma-separated list in the path. Returns full product data including all variants and images.

variable.description: (Required) Comma-separated list of up to 50 product IDs. When used for single-product operations, provide a single product ID.

Changes the display order of images for a product by providing an ordered list of image IDs. The order of image IDs in the request determines the display order, with the first image becoming the primary product image.

The Squarespace Products API allows developers to manage the product catalog of a Squarespace merchant site. It supports physical products, service products, gift cards, and digital downloads, along with their images and variants. Developers can create, update, retrieve, and delete products programmatically, enabling catalog synchronization with external systems. The API is well-suited for building product import tools, headless commerce integrations, or multi-channel retail management applications.

Contact Support:
 Name: Squarespace Developer Support
